records.question: Which conferences listed on http://www.informatik.uni-trier.de/~ley/db/conf/b/index.html have papers published in the journal Lecture Notes in Computer Science whose homepage is exactly http://www.springerlink.com/content/105633/?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT conference.id FROM conference
JOIN paper ON conference.id = paper.conferenceid
JOIN journal ON paper.journalid = journal.id
WHERE journal.homepage = 'http://www.springerlink.com/content/105633/' AND conference.homepage = 'http://www.informatik.uni-trier.de/~ley/db/conf/b/index.html' AND journal.fullname = 'Lecture Notes in Computer Science'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.Id FROM Conference AS T1 INNER JOIN Paper AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.ConferenceId INNER JOIN Journal AS T3 ON T2.JournalId = T3.Id WHERE T1.HomePage = 'http://www.informatik.uni-trier.de/~ley/db/conf/b/index.html' AND T3.FullName = 'Lecture Notes in Computer Science' AND T3.HomePage = 'http://www.springerlink.com/content/105633/?'

records.question: Which conferences have papers published in the journal with homepage http://www.springerlink.com/content/105633/?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT conference.id FROM conference
JOIN paper ON conference.id = paper.conferenceid
JOIN journal ON paper.journalid = journal.id
WHERE journal.homepage = 'http://www.springerlink.com/content/105633/'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.ConferenceId FROM Paper AS T1 INNER JOIN Journal AS T2 ON T1.JournalId = T2.Id WHERE T2.HomePage = 'http://www.springerlink.com/content/105633/'

records.question: What conferences have the shortname exactly ECLIPSE?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT conference.id FROM conference
WHERE conference.shortname = 'ECLIPSE'
records.pred_sql: SELECT Id FROM Conference WHERE ShortName = 'ECLIPSE'

records.question: Which conferences with shortname HAIS and homepage http://hais.pwr.wroc.pl had papers published in 2009 or later in the journal Lecture Notes in Computer Science, whose shortname is LNCS and homepage is http://www.springerlink.com/content/105633/?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT conference.id FROM conference
JOIN paper ON conference.id = paper.conferenceid
JOIN journal ON paper.journalid = journal.id
WHERE journal.homepage = 'http://www.springerlink.com/content/105633/' AND journal.shortname = 'LNCS' AND conference.homepage = 'http://hais.pwr.wroc.pl' AND conference.shortname = 'HAIS' AND paper.year >= 2009 AND journal.fullname = 'Lecture Notes in Computer Science'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Id FROM Conference AS T1 INNER JOIN Paper AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.ConferenceId INNER JOIN Journal AS T3 ON T2.JournalId = T3.Id WHERE T1.ShortName = 'HAIS' AND T1.HomePage = 'http://hais.pwr.wroc.pl' AND T2.Year >= 2009 AND T3.FullName = 'Lecture Notes in Computer Science' AND T3.ShortName = 'LNCS' AND T3.HomePage = 'http://www.springerlink.com/content/105633/'

records.question: Which conferences with the shortname ICCV have papers associated with them?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT conference.id FROM conference

WHERE conference.shortname = 'ICCV'

records.question: Which conferences with the shortname ICMLA and homepage http://www.icmla-conference.org/icmla11/ have papers from the year 2010 or later?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT conference.id FROM conference
JOIN paper ON conference.id = paper.conferenceid
WHERE conference.homepage = 'http://www.icmla-conference.org/icmla11/' AND conference.shortname = 'ICMLA' AND paper.year >= 2010
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.Id FROM Conference AS T1 INNER JOIN Paper AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.ConferenceId WHERE T1.ShortName = 'ICMLA' AND T1.HomePage = 'http://www.icmla-conference.org/icmla11/' AND T2.Year >= 2010 GROUP BY T1.Id

records.question: Which conferences with the shortname AAAI had papers published in the year 1991?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT conference.id FROM conference
JOIN paper ON conference.id = paper.conferenceid
WHERE conference.shortname = 'AAAI' AND paper.year = 1991
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.Id FROM Conference AS T1 INNER JOIN Paper AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.ConferenceId WHERE T1.ShortName = 'AAAI' AND T2.Year = 1991

records.question: Which conferences with the shortname COLING have the homepage http://www.coling-2010.org/ and include papers from the year 1994?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT conference.id FROM conference
JOIN paper ON conference.id = paper.conferenceid
WHERE conference.homepage = 'http://www.coling-2010.org/' AND paper.year = 1994 AND conference.shortname = 'COLING'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.Id FROM Conference AS T1 INNER JOIN Paper AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.ConferenceId WHERE T1.ShortName = 'COLING' AND T1.HomePage = 'http://www.coling-2010.org/' AND T2.Year = 1994
